title: Hormozi - What You Avoid Controls You
transcript: Business owners don't want to hear this, but what you avoid controls you. At least for me, I just try and face the thing that I'm avoiding. And so if you feel like you're constantly putting out fires all day and you're not even sure whether the thing you need to confront or to move forward, what it is, I get it. And we made something for you to help. What we did was we spent 200 hours analyzing all the companies in our portfolio, figuring out where they got stuck and what they did to get past it. We put in this automated tool where if you plug in your business information, it'll identify what state you're at and what the next steps need to be in a really customized report it's pretty sweet and the best part is it's absolutely free.

hook.text: Business owners don't want to hear this, but what you avoid controls you.

sections.name: Hook - Truth bomb
sections.summary: Lo que evitás te controla - verdad incómoda

sections.name: Empathy - Putting out fires
sections.summary: Valida la sensación de estar apagando incendios todo el día

sections.name: Solution - Automated tool
sections.summary: Herramienta que identifica tu estado y próximos pasos

key_phrases: I just try and face the thing that I'm avoiding

analysis.emotional_arc: Confrontación (lo que evitás te controla) → empatía (yo también, I get it) → solución automática
strengths: Hook filosófico que pega en el ego del business owner
Vulnerabilidad personal: 'at least for me' humaniza
Producto como diagnóstico, no como curso
patterns_to_replicate: Hook 'don't want to hear this, but...' genera curiosidad irresistible
Patrón DIAGNÓSTICO: posicionar el producto como herramienta que identifica el problema, no como solución genérica
Vulnerabilidad calculada: compartir que vos también luchás con lo mismo
